content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong global cues (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%) and broad-based domestic strength across all major sectors pre-market. Auto leading on M&M results, PSU banks +1.6%, IT +1.13%. Existing book is well-positioned with most names in profit and aligned with the morning's momentum. Priority is trailing SLs to lock in gains rather than fresh entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.7% unrealized; entry 984, CMP 1042. Current SL 1029 sits ~1.2% below CMP — already above entry. Loosening to 1015 is NOT permitted (guardrail blocks loosening). Keep SL at 1029 — that's already a profitable trail. Issuing HOLD via position_actions instead of MODIFY to avoid no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4% unrealized; SL 119 still ~2.6% below CMP 122.16. Defensive hedge against geopolitical/INR risk; thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at 1715 SL, locked at +0.9% above entry. CMP 1725-1750 zone, near ATH 1758. Q4 beat + cargo +15% YoY confirms thesis. Keep SL at 1715 — it's a no-op so emitting HOLD instead via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8% unrealized but record April sales +33% YoY (highest-ever, beat M&M/Tata/Hyundai). Auto sector leading today (+1.18%). Strong read-through from M&M results. SL 13400 still valid (~1% below CMP 13426). Thesis materially strengthening; hold for recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +68%), GNPA improved 140 bps, 52-week high tagged. Bank Nifty +1.04%, PSU Bank +1.6%. SL 204 holds — emitting HOLD via position_actions; this is a no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Audited Q4/FY26 board meeting May 14, 2026 — that is BINARY EVENT within ~6 trading sessions. Per rule 11, default disposition for held position into binary event is exit/trim/tighten SL. Position is +1.2% (small), 11 shares ~₹50K (~5% of capital). At ≤5% capital and tight SL, can hold. SL 4555 is 1.2% below CMP — already tight. No-op MODIFY; HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +156%, FY26 +200%, 18-year high tagged at 399. -0.5% intraday wobble normal after 60% one-month rally. SL 372 ~0.8% below CMP 374.95 — tight but appropriate given overbought conditions. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "new_target": 1570.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +125%, FY26 PAT +104%, record bookings +30%. -1.3% unrealized but thesis just confirmed by results. SL 1420 ~1.8% below CMP. No-op; HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7300.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6% unrealized, CMP 7005, near 52w-high 7200. Q4 PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.2%. Trail SL from 6900 to 6950 — this is breakeven+0.7%, sits 0.8% below CMP which is below the 1% trail-gap floor. Revising: leave SL at 6900 (1.5% below CMP, still room). No-op; emit HOLD via position_actions."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already above entry 984 (locked +4.6%). Trail-gap to CMP 1042 is ~1.2%, just above 1% floor. Q4 beat, MACD bullish crossover, MOFSL Buy. Let it run toward target 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position. SL 119 has 2.6% room. MACD bearish but West Asia geopol + INR weakness intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already locks +0.9%. Stock at ATH zone 1750, Q4 beat strong. Trail-gap to CMP is ~2%, healthy. Let target 1820 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Record April sales +33% YoY, sector leading today. -1.8% drawdown is noise; SL 13400 still valid. Auto-sector tailwind from M&M results should pull MARUTI."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68%, 52w-high zone. Banking momentum strong. SL 204 ~1.2% below CMP. Let it test target 220."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position is small (~5% capital, 11 shares) so the binary May 14 board meeting tail is contained. SL 4555 is 1.2% below CMP — already tight. If position approaches +3-4% before May 14, will trim or tighten further. Watch closely as event nears."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround +156% PAT, order book Rs 2.4 trillion. After 60% one-month rally, current SL 372 is appropriately tight (0.8% below CMP). Profit-booking risk acknowledged but trend intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results just out: PAT +125%, bookings +30%, net-debt negative. SL 1420 has 1.8% room. Let thesis play through."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.6% unrealized, near ATH. SL 6900 (=entry) has ~1.5% room from CMP 7005. Tightening to 6950 would compress trail-gap to 0.8%, below the 1% floor — risk of self-stopout on noise. Hold SL at breakeven 6900."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, CAMS, NAVINFLUOR Q4 beat names showing strong momentum. M&M would be a natural add to ride the auto wave but I already hold MARUTI in the same sector — adding M&M would push Auto cluster exposure too high. CAMS (+9% on results, EBITDA 46.5% record) is the cleanest setup not in book but it's already gapped — chasing a +9% pre-market gap on a financial-services name is not the entry I want; will wait for retracement to ~770 or breakout above 800 with volume. WOCKPHARMA +7.8% with no clear catalyst flagged, governance concerns historically — pass. VEDL post-demerger price discovery is messy, not actionable yet. POLYCAB/RRKABEL waiting on POLYCAB results today — binary, not entering pre-event.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is at 49% deployed with 9 positions, well-diversified across financial services, banking, auto, capital goods, real estate, chemicals, defence, ETF. Total unrealized P&L +₹5,531 (+0.55%). Most positions show favorable trail setups but SLs are already at appropriate levels (no MODIFY action needed today — emitting MODIFY when no change exists is a no-op signal failure I'm avoiding). Key risk to monitor: HAL board meeting May 14 (8 sessions away) — will assess trim/exit closer to event. Otherwise, a clean HOLD-everything tick that lets the morning's strong momentum work through the existing book is the right call. No new entries today: chasing pre-market gaps when the existing book is already aligned with the leading sectors (auto, financials, defence) would just dilute the thesis."
}
